name: CUMIN-PICKLED ONIONS
intro: A SIMPLE RECIPE for sandwich-worthy onions. Try them on the Berbere-Spiced Black-Eyed Pea Sliders.

ingredients.item: red onions, sliced into thin rings

method: Put the vinegar, water, sugar, cumin, and peppercorns in a medium saucepan and bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Decrease the heat to medium and cook, stirring occasionally, until the sugar dissolves, about 5 minutes. Remove from the heat and let cool to room temperature.

Put the onions in a canning jar, then pour the vinegar mixture into the jar. Cover tightly and refrigerate for at least 1 day before eating. Stored in the refrigerator, the onions will keep for up to 1 month.
